mapper.insert: insert into t_drone_location (uas_id, get_location_timestamp, subscription_id, ua_type, latitude, longitude, altitude, track_direction, speed, vertical_speed, route_deviation_rate, route_deviation_rate_update_time, reservation_id, uasl_id, uasl_section_id, operational_status, operator_id, flight_time, aircraft_info_id) values (#{uasId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{getLocationTimestamp,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{subscriptionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uaType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{latitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{longitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{altitude,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{trackDirection,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{speed,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{verticalSpeed,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{routeDeviationRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{routeDeviationRateUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{reservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uaslId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uaslSectionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{flightTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aircraftInfoId,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into t_drone_location
uas_id,
get_location_timestamp,
subscription_id,
ua_type,
latitude,
longitude,
altitude,
track_direction,
speed,
vertical_speed,
route_deviation_rate,
route_deviation_rate_update_time,
reservation_id,
uasl_id,
uasl_section_id,
operational_status,
operator_id,
flight_time,
aircraft_info_id,
#{uasId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{getLocationTimestamp,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{subscriptionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{uaType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{latitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{longitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{altitude,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{trackDirection,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{speed,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{verticalSpeed,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{routeDeviationRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{routeDeviationRateUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{reservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{uaslId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{uaslSectionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operationalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{flightTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{aircraftInfoId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update t_drone_location
uas_id = #{uasId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
get_location_timestamp = #{getLocationTimestamp,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
subscription_id = #{subscriptionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ua_type = #{uaType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
latitude = #{latitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
longitude = #{longitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
altitude = #{altitude,jdbcType=INTEGER},
track_direction = #{trackDirection,jdbcType=INTEGER},
speed = #{speed,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
vertical_speed = #{verticalSpeed,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
route_deviation_rate = #{routeDeviationRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
route_deviation_rate_update_time = #{routeDeviationRateUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reservation_id = #{reservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
uasl_id = #{uaslId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
uasl_section_id = #{uaslSectionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operational_status = #{operationalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operator_id = #{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
flight_time = #{flightTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
aircraft_info_id = #{aircraftInfoId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where (uas_id = #{uasId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} or reservation_id = #{reservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and get_location_timestamp = #{getLocationTimestamp,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
mapper.sql: uas_id, get_location_timestamp, subscription_id, ua_type, latitude, longitude, altitude, track_direction, speed, vertical_speed, route_deviation_rate, route_deviation_rate_update_time, reservation_id, uasl_id, uasl_section_id, operational_status, operator_id, flight_time, aircraft_info_id
reservation_id, get_location_timestamp, latitude, longitude, altitude, uasl_id, uasl_section_id, operational_status, operator_id, uas_id, ua_type, track_direction, speed, vertical_speed
mapper.select:
select 'false' as QUERYID,
from t_drone_location where reservation_id = #{reservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and get_location_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 SECONDS' order by get_location_timestamp desc limit 1

SELECT dl.uas_id, dl.get_location_timestamp, dl.subscription_id, dl.ua_type, dl.latitude, dl.longitude, dl.altitude, dl.track_direction, dl.speed, dl.vertical_speed, CASE WHEN ST_AsText(si.intersection_geometry) = 'POINT Z (' || #{longitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE} || ' ' || #{latitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE} || ' ' || #{altitude,jdbcType=INTEGER} || ')' THEN 0.0 ELSE 1.0 END AS route_deviation_rate, dl.route_deviation_rate_update_time, dl.reservation_id, si.uasl_id, si.uasl_section_id, CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_drone_location sub_dl1 WHERE sub_dl1.reservation_id = dl.reservation_id AND sub_dl1.route_deviation_rate = 0.0 ) THEN 'RouteApproach' ELSE dl.operational_status END AS operational_status, dl.operator_id, CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_drone_location sub_dl2 WHERE sub_dl2.reservation_id = dl.reservation_id ) THEN '00:00:00' ELSE ( SELECT dl.get_location_timestamp - ( SELECT sub_dl3.get_location_timestamp FROM t_drone_location sub_dl3 WHERE sub_dl3.reservation_id = dl.reservation_id ORDER BY sub_dl3.get_location_timestamp ASC LIMIT 1 ) )::TEXT END AS flight_time FROM t_drone_location dl JOIN ( SELECT ST_3DIntersection( adsg.uasl_section_solid_geometry, ST_GeomFromText('POINT Z (' || #{longitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE} || ' ' || #{latitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE} || ' ' || #{altitude,jdbcType=INTEGER} || ')') ) AS intersection_geometry, adsg.uasl_section_id AS uasl_section_id, adsg.uasl_id AS uasl_id FROM v_uasl_design_section_geometry adsg WHERE adsg.uasl_section_id = #{uaslSectionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS si ON 1 = 1 WHERE (dl.uas_id = #{uasId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} or dl.reservation_id = #{reservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND dl.get_location_timestamp = #{getLocationTimestamp,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP};

WITH expanded_points AS ( SELECT unnest(uasl_section_ids) AS point FROM t_uasl_reservation ar WHERE ar.uasl_reservation_id = #{reservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) SELECT ep.point FROM expanded_points ep ORDER BY (SELECT ST_3DDistance( adsg.uasl_section_solid_geometry, ST_GeomFromText('POINT Z (' || #{longitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE} || ' ' || #{latitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE} || ' ' || #{altitude,jdbcType=INTEGER} || ')') ) FROM v_uasl_design_section_geometry adsg WHERE adsg.uasl_section_id = ep.point) LIMIT 1;
